sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
moe_post_reorder is one of the important kernels in EP MoE.
Currently moe_post_reorder is using triton kernel. This PR is to introduce CUDA implementation for this kernel.
The new kernel is expected to gain performance improvement.

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove unnecessary fallback to prefill-decode attention
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR removes an unnecessary fallback to prefill-decode attention in vllm/v1/attention/backends/triton_attn.py. The code currently falls back to prefill-decode attention if the number of queries per key and value is of power 2. This was introduced in #18093 to overcome an issue with unifie

vllm.author: 22quinn

This PR provides the user an option to control NCCL_CUMEM_ENABLE, especially for RLHF cases.
This PR also adds explicit logging for all env overrides.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] properly catch PIL-related errors for vision models when incorrect data urls are provided
vllm.author: gcalmettes
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, when incorrect data images urls are sent to vision models, PIL.UnidentifiedImageError are raised, resulting in Internal Server Error as this type of exception is not caught (e.g.: if occurring in the _preprocess_chat step)
This PR converts PIL-related errors to ValueError so the exception

vllm.title: [MISC][Bugfix] Use less CPU when message queue has been empty for some time
vllm.author: p12tic
vllm.bodyExcerpt: In setups which have long inactivity periods it is desirable to reduce system power consumption when vllm does nothing. This would lead to more CPU thermal headroom when a request eventually comes, especially when multiple GPUs are connected as each GPU would otherwise pin one thread at 100% CPU usa

vllm.title: [P/D][NixlConnector] Enable FlashInfer backend
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables the use of VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHINFER in disaggregated prefill setups leveraging NixlConnector (which is currently allowed but broken on main).
The main difference wrt default FA backend is that FlashInfer swaps the cache first two dims (K/V and num_blocks) resulting in [num_b

vllm.title: [V1] Use FlashInfer by default on Blackwell GPUs
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FlashInfer has a specific backend for NVIDIA Blackwell so it is much more performant than FlashAttention2 default in V1 (FA3 is unsupported). If a user has it installed, I think we should choose it by default, which this PR achieves. See this comment for benchmarks #18095 (comment)

vllm.title: [v1][P/D] Fix a edge case in kv cache schedule
vllm.author: KingsleyZhang123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix the edge case in async kv load, where the request tokens left for compute are less then one block. Current implementation will still use 1 block and cache_block will fail.
